summary: Workout Engine Audit Round 3 — all 16 engine verification tests PASSED (100%). Verified 5 backend fixes: (1) 6-day Upper/Lower advanced body_recomp produces correct 3-upper/3-lower structure with Day 5 as upper_full (both push+pull); (2) Calisthenics 4-day produces correct Upper→Lower→Skill→Conditioning sequence, NOT Upper/Lower/Upper/Lower; (3) Cross-day deduplication prevents Barbell Bench Press from appearing in both Day 1 and Day 4/5; (4) Australian Pull-Up removed from all generated programs; (5) Cable Glute Kickback (qualified name) used throughout — no unqualified 'Cable Kickback'.

minor.issue: Cross-day dedup for cables-only equipment: when only 'cables' are selected, the exercise pool per pattern is very small, causing Cable Crossover, Cable Lateral Raise, and High-to-Low Cable Fly to appear in both Day 1 (Push) and Day 4 (Upper Full) of a 5-day PPL. The dedup logic works per-pattern (first-choice tracking) but different patterns (horizontal_push, incline_push) can both resolve to the same cable exercise. PRIMARY concern (Barbell Bench Press duplication) is FIXED — only minor cable pool overlap for cables-only users.

action_items: OPTIONAL: For cables-only equipment programs, the exercise pool per pattern is small enough that cross-day overlap still occurs for accessories (Cable Crossover in both Day 1 Push and Day 4 Upper Full). Consider expanding cable exercise options per pattern or adding a session-level dedup check across all slots/patterns. LOW priority — the primary compound dedup fix is working.
critical_code_review_comments: 6-day upper_lower SPLIT_MAP correctly maps to ['upper_push_heavy', 'lower_quad_focus', 'upper_pull_heavy', 'lower_hip_focus', 'upper_full', 'lower_full'] — 3 upper/3 lower confirmed

upper_full archetype label='Upper Body', focus='Chest, Back, Shoulders & Arms' — Day 5 correctly contains both push (chest, shoulder) and pull (back, lat, bicep) muscles as confirmed by muscle_groups in response

calisthenics_split 4-day correctly maps to ['calisthenics_upper', 'calisthenics_lower', 'calisthenics_skill', 'calisthenics_conditioning'] — Day 3 focus='Progressions, Holds & Skill Work' and Day 4 focus='Muscular Endurance & Work Capacity' confirmed
used_primary_options set at line 2284 correctly tracks first-choice exercises cross-day and rotates used ones to the back — verified Barbell Bench Press not in both Day 1 and Day 4/5

BODYWEIGHT_DIFFICULTY dict at line 1960 still contains 'Australian Pull-Up': 2 (difficulty tier entry) but the exercise is NOT present in the EXERCISE_OPTIONS horizontal_pull bodyweight pool (uses 'Inverted Row' instead) — this is correct behavior
Cable Glute Kickback consistently appears in glute pattern options for full_gym/beginner_gym/machines/cables equipment types — no unqualified 'Cable Kickback' found anywhere in exercise pools

structure.Day 5: upper_full — focus: 'Chest, Back, Shoulders & Arms' (BOTH push+pull confirmed)

T3_cross_day_dedup.note: 3 cable exercises appear in both Day 1 and Day 4 when equipment=cables only. Primary compound dedup fix working.

context_for_next_testing_agent: All 5 Round 3 fixes verified working: (1) upper_lower 6-day = 3 upper/3 lower with Day 5 = upper_full (both push+pull). (2) calisthenics 4-day = Upper/Lower/Skill/Conditioning correctly. (3) Cross-day dedup prevents primary compound repeats (Barbell Bench Press fix). (4) No Australian Pull-Up in any program. (5) Cable Glute Kickback (not Cable Kickback) is the standard name. Minor note: cables-only programs can still have cable exercise overlap across patterns (different pattern types sharing same cable exercises) — low priority.
rca_of_issue: N/A — all Round 3 fixes confirmed working end-to-end
